---
title: "HW3 Dashboard"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Load libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse) 

library(readxl)
```

```{r}
data <- read_excel("data/ncesdata_MASS_202425.xlsx", skip = 11)

glimpse(data)

```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
unique(data$Locale)

```

```{r}
summary(data$Students)

```

```{r}
data$Students <- as.numeric(data$Students)


```

```{r}
summary(data$Students)


```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

locale_counts <- data %>%
  count(Locale) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))


```

## Categorical Variable: Locale

This plot shows the number of schools by locale in Massachusetts.

```{r}
ggplot(locale_counts, aes(x = reorder(Locale, -n), y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2C6BAA") +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Schools by Locale in Massachusetts",
    x = "School Locale",
    y = "Number of Schools",
    caption = "Source: NCES"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))



```

## Numerical Variable: Students

This histogram shows the distribution of student enrollment across schools.

```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = Students)) +
  geom_histogram(fill = "#E69F00", bins = 30, color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Student Enrollment in Massachusetts Schools",
    x = "Number of Students",
    y = "Number of Schools",
    caption = "Source: NCES"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```
